name: Revolut Developer Platform
description: Revolut Business API + Merchant API + OpenBanking endpoints for payouts/checkout.

seo.title: Revolut Developer Platform — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Revolut Developer Platform: Revolut Business API + Merchant API + OpenBanking endpoints for payouts/checkout.

when_to_use: Business account payouts via Revolut API for payroll or vendor payments
Merchant checkout integration with Revolut Pay
Open Banking endpoints for account data and payment initiation
Multi-currency business transfers at real exchange rates

pros: Business API plus Merchant API plus Open Banking
review.verdict: Compelling for EU/UK teams already on Revolut Business, but depth trails the biggest PSPs.
review.best_for: EU/UK SMBs and fintechs combining banking, payouts, and checkout in one Revolut stack
review.not_for: Enterprises needing deep acquiring features or US-first coverage
